metadata.source: Mandatory fields identified from red asterisks on the original OAR form.
metadata.rule: The app highlights these fields until filled. The exported packet remains raw material; AI form generation still reports missing information after processing.

clinical.primary_diagnosis.label: Required on OAR: Primary DSM/ICD Diagnosis with Specifier

clinical.problem_list_status.label: Required on OAR: Problem List Status

clinical.problem_list_date.label: Required on OAR: Problem List Date

clinical.significant_impairment.label: Required on OAR: Explain Significant Impairment

clinical.sessions_begin_date.label: Required on OAR: Begin Date of Sessions

clinical.sessions_count.label: Required on OAR: Number of Sessions

clinical.first_contact_date.label: Required on Timeliness: Date of First Contact

clinical.first_contact_time.label: Required on Timeliness: Time of First Contact
